steps.title: Derive a third equal pair from the ratio
steps.content: From $\frac{GH}{GF}=\frac{LM}{LK}$ and $GH = LM = 34$, we get $\frac{34}{GF}=\frac{34}{LK}$, so $GF = LK$.

steps.title: Apply SAS to complete the proof
steps.content:
We now have three equalities:
  • $GF = LK$
  • $\angle G = \angle L = 30^{\circ}$
  • $GH = LM = 34$
In each triangle, the angle is between its two sides. By Side-Angle-Side (SAS) congruence, $\triangle FGH \cong \triangle KLM$ with the given information alone. D is correct.
